verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I lay in Zion for a foundation, a Stone, I lay in Zion for a foundation, a Stone, A tried Stone, a precious Cornerstone, A sure Foundation, a sure Foundation. A tried Stone, a precious Cornerstone, He that believeth shall, shall not make haste.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Wonderful, counselor, the Mighty God, The everlasting Father; Wonderful, Counselor, Prince of Peace I lay in Zion for a foundation, a Stone, I lay in Zion for a foundation, a Stone,

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: A tried Stone, a precious Cornerstone, A sure Foundation, a sure Foundation. A tried Stone, a precious Cornerstone, He that believeth shall, shall not make haste.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Wonderful, counselor, the Mighty God, The everlasting Father; Wonderful, Counselor, Prince of Peace Prince of Peace, Prince of peace.
